name: claude-cortex
description: Self-learning system for Claude Code. Captures learnings from every session, compiles knowledge, auto-promotes to CLAUDE.md rules and skills, decays stale patterns. Zero manual steps.

interface.shortDescription: Self-learning system that makes Claude Code smarter over time
interface.longDescription: Cortex captures corrections, patterns, decisions, and mistakes from every Claude Code session. It compiles them into scored knowledge articles, promotes high-confidence patterns to CLAUDE.md rules and skill files automatically, and decays stale patterns. The first tool to close the full learning loop: capture, compile, promote, decay.
defaultPrompt: What has Cortex learned so far?
Set up Cortex for this machine
